title: Email signature does not show up
excerpt: We have company created email templates which are shared.  One of our staff has their email configured, but after choosing one of our templates, her email disappears.

posts.author: cdement (colleen dement)
posts.cookedHtml: We have company created email templates which are shared. One of our staff has their email configured, but after choosing one of our templates, her email disappears.

posts.author: Jordan.Hyslop (Jordan Hyslop)
posts.cookedHtml: This has also started happeing to our team. Have you had any luck with a solution?

posts.author: cdement (colleen dement)
posts.cookedHtml: Not yet - Now is happening to 4 teams members. Was working before. Started on 1.29.25.

posts.author: cdement (colleen dement)
posts.cookedHtml: Not yet - we alerted Monday to the issue. If we ever get a response/solution will post it.

posts.author: bridieca (Bridie Castiel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there Colleen,

I’ve just taken a look at your support history and I can see we’re working on a solution. I’ll try to gather some more information for you on it!

Best.

posts.author: amybronstein (Amy Bronstein)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there @cdement, Amy from the monday team here . Thanks for flagging this! This was actually a major bug, but the good news is it should be all resolved now. If you try again, everything should work as expected. If you still run into any issues, feel free to let us know and we’ll take another look!
